Our Legacy

Defining the
Sterile Standard.

Founded in 2012, KRG Medifabb has evolved from a specialized textile unit into a global powerhouse for surgical disposables.

2012

Founded

50+

Markets

15+

Sterile Units

ISO 13485

Quality Certs

M

Our Mission

"To empower clinical teams worldwide with high-performance disposables that ensure absolute safety, enabling them to focus on what matters most—saving lives."

V

Our Vision

To become the world's most trusted partner for customized surgical packs, driving innovation in medical fabric science for a safer tomorrow.

Clinical Precision

Every fiber and every fold is engineered to meet the highest standards of sterile integrity.

Global Trust

Partnering with premium hospital networks across Europe, MENA, and Asia-Pacific.

Quality Absolute

Our manufacturing lines operate under rigorous ISO and WHO-GMP compliance protocols.

Innovation Lead

Pioneering new SMS fabric blends that offer superior barrier protection and surgeon comfort.

A Global Legacy in Motion

From our state-of-the-art manufacturing hub in India, we ship to over 50 countries, maintaining 100% sterile compliance every single time.

Manufactured for
the Future.

Footer

KRGMedifabb

Elevating surgical standards through high-performance medical textiles and sterile precision manufacturing.
